privileged_info_summary: The task is to restructure 8 work items in the TailwindTraders Azure DevOps project into three new area paths: Backend (3 items), Frontend (3 items), and Infrastructure (2 items). The 8 work items are: three backend API/service items, three frontend UI items, and two infrastructure pipeline/database items. The work item mapping metadata is accurate and complete with exact title matches. The required areas are Backend, Frontend, and Infrastructure. All data is synthetically generated by the task setup script.
